name: inject
desc: A dependency injection framework for Dart.

name: Injector
desc: An annotation marking an abstract class as a blueprint to generate an injector.

name: Injector.new
desc: Creates a blueprint for an injector.

name: modules
desc: The list of modules supplying providers for the injector.

name: Qualifier
desc: A metadata annotation representing a reserved name used alongside provide to further specify a key.

name: Qualifier.new
desc: Creates a named provider qualifier from name.

name: name
desc: The unique name of this qualifier.

name: asynchronous
desc: An annotation to mark a module provider method that returns a Future.

name: injector
desc: An annotation to mark something as an Injector with no included modules.

name: module
desc: An annotation to mark a class as a collection of providers for dependency injection.

name: provide
desc: An annotation for a method (in an Injector or module), class, or constructor that provides an instance.

name: singleton
desc: An injectable class or module provider that provides a single instance.
